headline: Hormel Foods Corp. (NYSE:HRL) Offers a High 5.12% Yield, But Can Its Dividend Be Sustained?
summary: Hormel Foods offers a high 5.12% dividend yield with a long payment history, supported by solid financials despite a temporarily elevated payout ratio.
